contentBlocks.original:
ॐ पृथ्वि त्वया धृता लोका
देवि त्वं विष्णुना धृता ।
त्वं च धारय मां देवि
पवित्रं कुरु चासनम् ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
ŏm Prthvi ṭvayaa ḍhrtaa l̤okaa
ḍevi ṭvam Vissnnunaa ḍhrtaa |
ṭvam Ca ḍhaaraya ṃaam ḍevi
Pavitram ḵuru Ca-[ā]asanam ||
contentBlocks.translation: Om, O Prithivi devi, by you are borne the entire loka (world); and devi, you in turn are borne by Sri Vishnu, please hold me (on your lap), and make this asana (seat of the worshipper) pure.
contentBlocks.meanings: ॐ (om) – sacred sound; पृथ्वि (pṛthvi) – earth; त्वया (tvayā) – by you; धृता (dhṛtā) – borne; लोका (lokāḥ) – worlds; देवि (devi) – goddess; त्वं (tvaṃ) – you; विष्णुना (viṣṇunā) – by Vishnu; धृता (dhṛtā) – borne; त्वं (tvaṃ) – you; च (ca) – and; धारय (dhāraya) – hold; मां (māṃ) – me; देवि (devi) – goddess; पवित्रं (pavitraṃ) – pure; कुरु (kuru) – make; चासनम् (cāsanam) – and seat (ca:and | āsanam:seat);
